hooks.command: node -e "const c=process.env.CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT||''; if(/git push/.test(c)){process.stderr.write('\n[pre-push-hook] Running CI safety checks...\n'); const {execSync}=require('child_process'); try{execSync('bash .githooks/pre-push',{stdio:'inherit',cwd:process.env.CLAUDE_CWD||process.cwd()})}catch(e){process.exit(e.status||1)}}"
